\tzpentry{ID3631}{Dhat Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3631 introduces Dhat Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} d\hat{x} = F(\hat{x})\,dt + K(t)\bigl(dy - h(\hat{x})\,dt\bigr). \end{equation}
